job_title: Marketing and Sales Support Coordinator - Full Time
strengths: CRM and Excel pivot table proficiency
Event planning and vendor coordination experience
weaknesses: No mention of hospitality suite or meal coordination
No explicit bulk mail or postage handling
No stated golf cart/community vehicle driving experience
No direct mention of competitive analysis or marketing plan prep
improvement_bullets: Supported CMO and Sales teams with lead management, including CRM data entry, lead distribution, and conducting investigative discovery questions to qualify prospective clients.
Streamlined department operations by managing inventory, ordering office supplies and marketing collateral, and overseeing bulk mailings and official correspondence to ensure brand consistency.
Managed departmental finances and office services, including processing invoices and refunds, coordinating hospitality suite reservations, and arranging guest meal services.
Assisted with marketing strategy by performing competitive analysis, maintaining industry information databases, and preparing marketing research reports to support the CMO.
Maintained a valid driver's license and demonstrated ability to safely operate company vehicles for client transport and community events as required.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Marketing and Sales Support Coordinator - Full Time opportunity with Medford Leas. I am interested in this opportunity because of the organization’s long-standing reputation for leadership and innovation in continuing care. What interests me about working for Medford Leas is its unique, community-focused approach and commitment to fostering an active, fulfilling life for residents. I believe my expertise in executive administrative support and my background in marketing coordination would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a proactive, solution-oriented mindset. In fact, at Direct Clean Solutions, I identified a bottleneck in our recruitment pipeline and reorganized our CRM data tracking, which improved lead management efficiency by 25%. Ultimately, I know that the Marketing and Sales Support Coordinator role at Medford Leas would allow me to bring my high-level CRM and administrative expertise to support your sales goals. Additionally, my role as an Executive Administrative Assistant at Direct Clean Solutions enabled me to develop my event planning and hospitality coordination skills. I successfully managed trade show logistics and vendor relations, ensuring all materials were prepared well in advance and that client experiences were seamless. This experience directly translates to your need for hospitality suite management and event execution. I am excited by the opportunity to use my ability to remain calm under pressure in working on the front lines of your community at Medford Leas. I know that my background in sales support and my commitment to superior customer service align with what it takes to succeed at the Marketing and Sales Support Coordinator role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Millieann Velez
